title: Dolo Odo Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Dolo Odo with a Z-Score of +5.00. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Dolo Odo has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature is causing a significant increase in cooling degree days (CDD) with a value of 16.5 GG, while the heating degree days (HDD) are at 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 38% and the wind speed is moderate at 16.5 km/h.
